title: Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple
tagline: Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple is located in the village Rameshwar Wadi in Devgad taluka of Sindhudurg District, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple is located in the village Rameshwar Wadi in Devgad taluka of Sindhudurg District, Maharashtra, India. This temple is dedicated to the Hindu deity Shiva. It is a historic temple built in the 16th century. Its chief interest is the approach about 250 yards long, cut through rock fifty feet deep.

topPlaces.name: Oros, Sindhudurg
topPlaces.description: Oros is a town and the district headquarters of the Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra. It is also known as "Sindhudurgnagari".

topPlaces.name: Pendur
topPlaces.description: Pendur village is located in Malvan Tehsil of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra, India. It is situated 26 km away from sub-district headquarter Malwan and 12 km away from district headquarter Oras.

topPlaces.name: Sarambal
topPlaces.description: Sarambal is an ancient village located in Kudal taluka. Although Sarambal is predominantly Hindu and Muslim, there are several Christian societies located near Kavilkata (Kavil Gao) village.

topPlaces.name: Mandakuli
topPlaces.description: Mandakuli is a small village in Kudal in Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on Karli River in southwest Maharashtara.

topPlaces.name: Dikval
topPlaces.description: Dikval or Dikwal is a village in Golvan-Kumame panchayat, Malvan taluka in the district of Sindhudurg, Maharashtra, India, about 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from the Arabian Sea. In 2011 it had a population of 325.

topPlaces.name: Shree Kaleshwara Temple
topPlaces.description: Shri Kaleshwar Mandir, Shree Kaleshwara Mandira (according to Marathi phonology § Vowels) or Shree Kaleshwara Devasthana (According to natives of Nerur village ) is a large Hindu temple in Nerur, Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra, India. It is dedicated to the village deity, Shree Kaleshwara, who is also called Kaloba.

topPlaces.name: Dhamapur Dam
topPlaces.description: Dhamapur Dam is an earth-fill dam constructed in 1530 by the villagers and Nagesh Desai who was Mandlik of the Vijaynagar dynasty. The lake behind the dam is one of the biggest lakes of Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

items.note: Oros is a town and the district headquarters of the Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra. It is also known as "Sindhudurgnagari".
Pendur village is located in Malvan Tehsil of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra, India. It is situated 26 km away from sub-district headquarter Malwan and 12 km away from district headquarter Oras.
Sarambal is an ancient village located in Kudal taluka. Although Sarambal is predominantly Hindu and Muslim, there are several Christian societies located near Kavilkata (Kavil Gao) village.
Mandakuli is a small village in Kudal in Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra, India. It is situated on Karli River in southwest Maharashtara.

Dikval or Dikwal is a village in Golvan-Kumame panchayat, Malvan taluka in the district of Sindhudurg, Maharashtra, India, about 10 kilometres (6.2 mi) from the Arabian Sea. In 2011 it had a population of 325.

Shri Kaleshwar Mandir, Shree Kaleshwara Mandira (according to Marathi phonology § Vowels) or Shree Kaleshwara Devasthana (According to natives of Nerur village ) is a large Hindu temple in Nerur, Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra, India. It is dedicated to the village deity, Shree Kaleshwara, who is also called Kaloba.

Dhamapur Dam is an earth-fill dam constructed in 1530 by the villagers and Nagesh Desai who was Mandlik of the Vijaynagar dynasty. The lake behind the dam is one of the biggest lakes of Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (43 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Dev Rameshwar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Oros, Sindhudurg, Pendur, Sarambal, Mandakuli, Dikval.
